user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Godiva
Product type: Dark Chocolate Truffles
Tone: luxurious, indulgent, elegant
Visual style: Rich, dark hues with gold accents and close-up shots highlighting the smooth texture and glossy finish of the truffles.
Conceptual technique: sensory indulgence storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Temptation in Every Bite
brief.caption: A luxurious scene where a delicate gold-rimmed porcelain plate holds an assortment of Godiva dark chocolate truffles, each with a glossy finish, under a soft spotlight that accentuates their rich texture. A velvet burgundy cloth drapes sensually in the background, with gold Godiva branding elegantly embossed on the side.
brief.visual_style: Rich, dark hues with gold accents and close-up shots highlighting the smooth texture and glossy finish of the truffles.
brief.typography_style: Elegant serif with delicate flourishes, reminiscent of calligraphy
brief.color_scheme: deep chocolate brown, luxurious gold, and opulent burgundy
